SI1.title: Classroom Scenario: Starting a Lesson
SI1.setup: You are about to start a Grade 3 Math lesson on multiplication. You have 25 students waiting and they are looking at you expectantly.
SI1.studentPersona: A curious 8-year-old who asks direct questions. Gets confused easily if instructions are vague or unclear.
SI1.initialStudentMessage: Teacher, what are we doing today?
SI1.indicatorFocus: Instructional Clarity — teacher must state a clear learning objective so students know what they will learn and why
rubricCriteria: Learning objective stated clearly in student-friendly language
Students understand what they will be able to do by end of lesson
Goal connected to prior knowledge or real context
